ofrece información sobre la zona arqueol: offers information about the archaeological zone of Teotihuacán, one of the most emblematic cities of ancient Mesoamerica. Although the specific content of the site is not detailed in the available results, it is likely to include details about the pyramids, visiting hours, entrance prices, and recommendations for visitors.
Teotihuacán, cuyo nombre en náhuatl sign: Teotihuacán, whose name in Nahuatl means “Place where the gods were made”, is located approximately 50 km northeast of Mexico City. Built between the 1st and 7th centuries AD, this pre-Hispanic city is famous for its monumental structures, such as the Pyramid of the Sun, the Pyramid of the Moon, and the Temple of Quetzalcoatl. The city was an important cultural, political and religious center, and its influence spread throughout much of Mesoamerica.([INAH][1], [Wikipédia][2])

El Museum Soumaya es un icónico museo de: The Museum Soumaya is an iconic art museum located in Mexico City, founded by the Carlos Slim Foundation. Its main building, with a futuristic design covered in hexagonal panels, is located in the Polanco area and is one of the most recognized architectural attractions in the city.
El Museum Nacional de Antropología, ubic: The National Museum of Anthropology, located in the heart of Chapultepec Castle, is the most important place for the study and dissemination of the pre-Hispanic cultures of Mexico.
Su colección de piezas icónicas, como la: Its collection of iconic pieces, such as the Stone of the Sun, is a journey through the history of Mesoamerica. Come visit this Mexican heritage.
El Auditorio Nacional es uno de los reci: The National Auditorium is one of the most important cultural and entertainment venues in Mexico, located on Paseo de la Reforma, in Mexico City. It is known for its ability to host large-scale events, such as concerts, plays, operas, and conferences.
Tiene capacidad para más de 10,000 perso: It seats more than 10,000 people and is famous for its high-quality acoustics. In addition, it has exhibition areas and an additional room called “Lunario”.
Este museo alberga una extensa colección: This museum houses an extensive art collection that includes pieces from pre-Hispanic times to the 20th century, highlighting works by European artists such as Rodin, Dalí and Monet, as well as Mexican artists. No, nuestras habitaciones no cuentan con: No, our rooms do not have air conditioning; however we provide portable fans, air coolers with water and heaters upon guest request. The rooms are equipped with double-glazed windows for noise insulation and better thermal control.
¿Debo reservar el estacionamiento?: Do I need to reserve parking?
Nuestro estacionamiento es pequeño y es: Our parking lot is small and is a FREE service. For this reason, we operate a “parking subject to availability” policy. Daily, access is given to vehicles as they arrive at the facilities. If the parking lot is full by the time you arrive, you will have to look for another alternative (nearby public parking or street parking with meter payment). There are 3 parking spaces near our facilities and the cost of this must be covered by the guest. We do not have special agreements with any of these alternative services. In the case of parking on the street, the parking meter operates from Monday to Friday from 8:00 am – 8:00 pm and it is the guest's responsibility to pay for it. Obtaining a spot in our parking lot on the day of your check-in does not guarantee subsequent nights in the event that you remove your vehicle from the parking lot. Parking is typically sufficient for the vast majority of calendar dates. The most problematic days are Saturdays, dates when there are massive events in CDMX (international concerts, Formula 1 events, Day of the Dead festival, and during the month of December in general).
No, nuestro apartahotel no acepta mascot: No, our aparthotel does not accept pets of any kind.
¿Aceptan niños o tienen tarifas especial: Do you accept children or do you have special rates for minors?
En Suites Mine no se aceptan niños menor: Children under 6 years of age are not accepted at Suites Mine. We ask you not to book if you are traveling with a minor of this age, since your reservation will be canceled without the right to a refund if you arrive at the facilities with a minor who does not meet the minimum age. The reason for this policy is to offer a quiet environment to the rest of our guests and because the construction and decoration of rooms is not suitable for minors. Children 6 years and older must be considered one more guest at the time of booking and the rate as an adult guest will apply.
¿Es posible hacer un check-in temprano ó: Is it possible to do an early check-in or a late check-out?
Early check-in’s sólo pueden solicitarse: Early check-in's can only be requested after 6:00 pm the day before arrival by calling our central office at (+52) 55-36-66-85-35 and it will depend on availability in the calendar to allow early access for a fixed fee. Early check-in is only allowed after 9:00 am. In the case of late check-out, this must also be requested one day before check-out after 6:00 pm and allows a maximum check-out at 4:00 pm charging a fixed rate. Due to the high occupancy of the property, we recommend that our guests do not consider early check-in or late check-out as a safe option when organizing their trip, since most of the time, we are unable to grant it. Our staff already goes to great lengths to handle an earlier check-in than most accommodations in the area.
¿Cuentan con servicio de resguardo de eq: Do you have a luggage storage service?
Suites Mine recibe equipaje sin costo ad: Suites Mine receives luggage at no additional cost on the same day of check-in or check-out at no additional cost. The luggage storage service hours are from 9:00 am – 10:00 pm every day.
En caso de que usted requiera dejar su e: In case you need to leave your luggage in storage for a few days while you make another trip, a fixed rate per day per suitcase / bag / backpack will be charged. Please consult this service with the reception.
¿Puedo reservar desde una noche previa a: Can I make a reservation the night before my arrival if I arrive in the early morning?
No. Nuestro servicio es una opción alter: No. Our service is an alternative lodging option and we do not consider ourselves a hotel. We do not operate 24 hours a day, so if your arrival is not within our operating hours, we invite you to choose another lodging service that does operate 24 hours a day. Our check-in time is from 2:00 pm – 12:30 am (next day).
¿Cuentan con habitaciones para personas: Do you have rooms for people with reduced mobility?
Algunos ESTUDIOS del primer piso están l: Some STUDIOS on the first floor are slightly equipped with some additions to help people with reduced mobility or older adults. They may have safety bars in showers and an additional chair to place in the shower. Entering the aparthotel requires climbing around 10 steps, so people who do not have a minimum of mobility, it is advisable not to book with us. From the underground parking, we have access to the elevator if required. If you have special needs, we ask you to make your reservation by calling the number (+52) 55 36 66 85 35 and present your case to obtain the best possible attention.
Suites Mine no es un hotel. Somos un ser: Suites Mine is not a hotel. We are an alternative lodging service that could be identified as an Airbnb's building. There are substantial services that we do not offer and that are exclusive to a hotel: 24-hour reception, concierge service, bell service, breakfast included, hotel-airport transportation, etc.
Suites Mine ofrece un servicio de calida: Suites Mine offers quality service with much more competitive rates than a hotel in the area. You should be aware that the reason you get a service at a competitive price is because some services are sacrificed that we do not consider a priority for our market. If you are looking for a hotel service, we recommend booking at a chain hotel like the many that exist in the area and that offer services at much higher rates. The hotel-type services that we do offer are: daily cleaning, luggage storage, room equipment, high-speed Wi-Fi included, pay TV included, surveillance, reception and amenities (shampoo, shower gel, linens, clothes iron, hair dryer).
¿Qué diferencia hay entre los tipos de h: What is the difference between room types?
Los ESTUDIOS son las habitaciones más ec: The STUDIOS are the cheapest rooms, followed by the SUITES and finally the DOUBLE SUITES. The only difference between the Studios and the Suites is the kitchen equipment. The Studios have a partial kitchenette equipped with a refrigerator, microwave oven, electric coffee maker, bread toaster and sink; while the Suites have a kitchen with these same elements, but also have an electric grill, extraction hood, pots and pans for cooking. Studios are located on floors 1, 2 and 3; The Suites are located on floors 4 and 5. These 2 types of rooms have capacity for up to 3 guests (one King size bed + 1 double sofa bed).
Las Suites Dobles son más grandes que lo: The Double Suites are larger than the Studios and Suites and the main difference is that they have 2 queen size beds and a full kitchen (just like the Suites). These rooms have a maximum capacity for up to 4 guests (two King size beds + 1 double sofa bed).
¿Con qué amenidades cuenta Suites Mine?: What amenities does Suites Mine have?
Ofrecemos un rooftop con horario de oper: We offer a rooftop with daily operating hours from 10:30 am – 10:00 pm. In this space, we have a common jacuzzi for 8 people, a small room, lounge chairs, tables, bar, bathrooms with shower and a la carte food service. Soon the branch will have a gym for our guests (September 2025).
¿Ofrecen descuentos para estancias larga: Do you offer discounts for long stays?
Manejamos 3 tarifas: noche, semana con d: We have 3 rates: night, week with a 10% discount (from 7 consecutive nights in the same room), and month with a 20% discount (from 30 consecutive nights in the same room). These discounts are available on our official website and through reservations by phone at (+52) 55 36 66 85 35.
¿Cómo puedo realizar una reserva?: How can I make a reservation?
Existen 3 maneras de realizar una reserv: There are 3 ways to make a reservation with us:
1.- Mediante llamada telefónica al númer: 1.- By phone call to the number (+52) 55 36 66 85 35
3.- Mediante plataformas digitales como:: 3.- Through digital platforms such as: Booking.com, Expedia.com, Airbnb
Las reservas realizadas por medio de nue: Reservations made through our website or digital platforms will be charged the cost of the first night of the reservation as a guarantee. Reservations made by phone call may be guaranteed through a section that must be made by bank transfer. The remaining amount of the guarantee can be settled upon arrival at the aparthotel with our authorized payment methods.
¿Qué formas de pago aceptan?: What payment methods do you accept?
Aceptamos pago en efectivo en pesos mexi: We accept cash payment in Mexican pesos, Visa, MasterCard, Carnet and American Express credit and debit cards. For reservations made in advance and by telephone, it is possible to request payment by national bank transfer and virtual payment link.
La mayoría de las reservas se pueden fac: Most reservations can be invoiced with itemized VAT. It is necessary to present your Tax Status Certificate issued by the Mexican SAT and an email during your stay to send you your invoice. There are some payment schemes for direct telephone sales in which it is not possible to invoice. Invoices with international validity are not issued for tax deduction in other countries. If you are a foreign guest, you can request a receipt not certified by the SAT to justify your expenses in your foreign company.
En suitesmine.com (en adelante PROMOTORA: At suitesmine.com (hereinafter PROMOTORA IRMAN SA DE CV), we are aware of the importance of maintaining the confidentiality of the personal and sensitive information of our guests and clients. We are committed to protecting your information and privacy, in accordance with the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties, published in the Official Gazette of the Federation* on July 5, 2010. Below, we provide you with important information about the collection and use of personal data.
Es posible que recolectemos información: We may collect personal information at various points of contact and interaction with our customers, including our website, reservation system, information shared through social networks, our systems and at the Apparthotel. This information may include: your contact details; information related to your reservation, stay or visit to the Apparthotel; information related to the purchase and enjoyment of products and services we offer; personal characteristics, nationality, passport number or official identification and its place and date of issue; records of previous visits; payment information; RFC, activity, preferences during your stay; marketing and communication preferences; comments and opinions about our services and facilities; packages reserved at the Apparthotel, travel information and preferences. We may also collect information about your travel companions, such as names and preferences during your stay, as well as any medical information you choose to share with us.
Uso de información personal y sensible: Use of personal and sensitive information
PROMOTORA IRMAN SA DE CV utiliza la info: PROMOTORA IRMAN SA DE CV uses the aforementioned information to provide you with the services requested or related to a purchase or program. We may also use this information to improve our services, ensure that our website and services are of interest to you, process payments, refunds and requests; respond to inquiries about the goods and services we offer. Additionally, we may use this information to send you communications related to our services, promotions, offers and special events.
PROMOTORA IRMAN SA DE CV puede transferi: PROMOTORA IRMAN SA DE CV may transfer personal information to third parties when necessary for the prevention or diagnosis of medical problems, for medical care or when requested by a competent authority. We may also transfer your data to third parties who manage our software and technological infrastructure to provide our services, perform maintenance or repair failures in our systems.
Si el cliente no manifiesta su oposición: If the client does not express his opposition to the transfer of his personal data, it will be understood that he consents to this policy.
PROMOTORA IRMAN SA DE CV ha implementado: PROMOTORA IRMAN SA DE CV has implemented the necessary physical, technical and administrative security measures to protect personal and sensitive information stored on our servers and systems, preventing unauthorized access or data theft. Our servers are configured with data encryption, and your information is protected by SSL technology when you enter data during reservations or register your email to request information.
Identidad y dirección del responsable: Identity and address of the person responsible
PROMOTORA IRMAN SA DE CV se declara como: PROMOTORA IRMAN SA DE CV is declared as a company legally constituted in accordance with Mexican laws, with its tax address at Kepler 147, N/A Col Veronica Anzures, CP 11590, Miguel Hidalgo, CDMX, Mexico, and the address of the Apparthotel at Rio Ebro 64, Colonia Cuauhtémoc, CP 06500, CDMX.
Medios para ejercer los derechos de acce: Means to exercise the rights of access, rectification, cancellation or opposition of personal data (ARCO)
Todos sus datos personales son tratados: All your personal data is processed in accordance with the applicable legislation in force in the country. You have the right to access, correct, cancel or oppose the processing of your personal data at any time. You can exercise these rights by sending a written request to our Reservations and Sales Department at sales@suitesmine.com or by calling +52 55 36 66 85 35. You will receive a response within the legal deadline, through the means indicated in your request.
Este aviso de privacidad puede ser modif: This privacy notice may be modified by PROMOTORA IRMAN SA DE CV at any time. Any changes will be informed promptly through the Suites Mine website, indicating the date of the latest version.
Si usted tiene una cuenta registrada en: If you have a registered account on this website or have left comments, you can request an exported file of the personal data we hold, including any additional information you have provided to us.
También puede solicitar la eliminación d: You can also request the deletion of any personal data we have stored. This request does not include data that we are legally obliged to retain for administrative, legal or security reasons. In short, it is not possible to delete information essential for a person to remain an active customer (for example, basic data such as email address).
En caso de solicitar la eliminación tota: If you request the complete deletion of your data, we will not be able to continue offering support or services related to our products.
La privacidad de las personas usuarias e: The privacy of users is extremely important to us. In compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), AncoraThemes allows residents of the European Union to use its services. Therefore, we seek to comply with the standards established by said regulation.
Para más información, puede consultar el: For more information, you can consult the following link: [EU GDPR Information Portal](https://www.eugdpr.org).
En México, el sistema de protección de d: In Mexico, the personal data protection system is governed by the **Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (LFPDPPP)**, in force since 2010.
Proteger los datos personales en posesió: Protect personal data held by companies and individuals, guaranteeing privacy and the right to informational self-determination of people.
– **Responsable**: Persona física o mora: – **Responsible**: Natural or legal person who decides on the processing of personal data.
– **Titular**: Persona a quien pertenece: – **Owner**: Person to whom the personal data belongs.
– **Tratamiento**: Cualquier uso de los: – **Processing**: Any use of personal data (collection, storage, use, transfer, etc.).
Los titulares de datos personales tienen: Holders of personal data have the right to:
– **Acceso**: Conocer qué datos se tiene: – **Access**: Know what data is held about them.
– **Cancelación**: Solicitar la eliminac: – **Cancellation**: Request the deletion of your data.
– **Oposición**: Negarse al tratamiento: – **Opposition**: Refuse to process your data in certain cases.
La institución responsable de velar por: The institution responsible for ensuring compliance with this law is:
**INAI – Instituto Nacional de Transpare: **INAI – National Institute of Transparency, Access to Information and Protection of Personal Data**

offers information about the archaeologi: offers information about the archaeological zone of Teotihuacán, one of the most emblematic cities of ancient Mesoamerica. Although the specific content of the site is not detailed in the available results, it is likely to include details about the pyramids, visiting hours, entrance prices, and recommendations for visitors.
Teotihuacán, whose name in Nahuatl means: Teotihuacán, whose name in Nahuatl means “Place where the gods were made”, is located approximately 50 km northeast of Mexico City. Built between the 1st and 7th centuries AD, this pre-Hispanic city is famous for its monumental structures, such as the Pyramid of the Sun, the Pyramid of the Moon, and the Temple of Quetzalcoatl. The city was an important cultural, political and religious center, and its influence spread throughout much of Mesoamerica.([INAH][1], [Wikipédia][2])
official site of the National Institute: official site of the National Institute of Anthropology and History (INAH): [https://www.inah.gob.mx/zonas/23-zona-arqueologica-de-teotihuacan]
